## 🎯 Contribution Level
<!-- Please check the box that applies to your contribution. (Put an 'x' inside the brackets like [x]) -->

- [ ] 🟢 **Level 1 – First Step** (I added my name to contributors.md)
- [ ] 🟡 **Level 2 – Fixer** (I fixed a typo, grammar issue, or formatting)

## ✅ Checklist
<!-- Make sure you have completed the following steps -->

- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] My PR has a descriptive title.
- [ ] For Level 2: The fix is small and improves readability.
- [ ] For Level 3: I used the `sample.md` format for my project.

🎉 **Thank you for contributing!** 🎉
